message:
🐛 Fix nil slice serializing to null in health endpoint JSON (#10805)

Replace var providerSummaries []ProviderSummary (nil → JSON null)
with make([]ProviderSummary, 0) (empty → JSON []). Prevents frontend
crashes when no providers configured and .map()/.filter() is called.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
